news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Oil India to Overweight, raises TP to Rs 563 citing Qatar LNG disruptions.
Higher oil/coal demand benefits upstream players, while GAIL & Petronet LNG face downgrades due to weak gas demand.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Oil India to Overweight, raises TP to Rs 563 citing Qatar LNG disruptions.
Higher oil/coal demand benefits upstream players, while GAIL & Petronet LNG face downgrades due to weak gas demand.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).
Sector rotation favors defence, energy, and shipping companies amid rising crude prices and global uncertainty.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).
Sector rotation favors defence, energy, and shipping companies amid rising crude prices and global uncertainty.

news.title:
Oil India upgrades NSPL pipeline to 5.5 MMTPA, supporting Numaligarh Refinery expansion.
Expansion aligns with Hydrocarbon Vision 2030 for North-East by Govt of India.
news.summary:
Oil India upgrades NSPL pipeline to 5.5 MMTPA, supporting Numaligarh Refinery expansion.
Expansion aligns with Hydrocarbon Vision 2030 for North-East by Govt of India.

news.title:
PM Modi inaugurated Oil India Ltd's pipeline upgrade in North East.
Capacity increased from 1.72 MMTPA to 5.5 MMTPA; cost ₹750 cr, under budget.
news.summary:
PM Modi inaugurated Oil India Ltd's pipeline upgrade in North East.
Capacity increased from 1.72 MMTPA to 5.5 MMTPA; cost ₹750 cr, under budget.

news.title:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.
Iran-Israel crisis raises speculation on further upside for these stocks.
news.summary:
ONGC and Oil India shares see double-digit gains, outperforming sector in 2026.
Iran-Israel crisis raises speculation on further upside for these stocks.

news.title:
Oil India and HPCL see sharp rise in NSE F&O futures OI, up over 10%.
Increase in OI shows fresh positions, higher trader participation in derivatives.
news.summary:
Oil India and HPCL see sharp rise in NSE F&O futures OI, up over 10%.
Increase in OI shows fresh positions, higher trader participation in derivatives.

news.title:
ONGC, Oil India shares rose amid US-Iran tensions, with crude prices initially spiking 13% before settling below $80/barrel.
JP Morgan suggests booking profits in upstream firms like ONGC if tensions ease; city gas firms may face margin pressure.
news.summary:
ONGC, Oil India shares rose amid US-Iran tensions, with crude prices initially spiking 13% before settling below $80/barrel.
JP Morgan suggests booking profits in upstream firms like ONGC if tensions ease; city gas firms may face margin pressure.

news.title:
Nifty braces for gap down as Dow futures drop 500+ points amid Iran crisis.
Oil-linked stocks like ONGC, Oil India, HPCL may gain focus; Brent crude rises 10%.
news.summary:
Nifty braces for gap down as Dow futures drop 500+ points amid Iran crisis.
Oil-linked stocks like ONGC, Oil India, HPCL may gain focus; Brent crude rises 10%.

news.title:
Oil PSUs utilized 81% of FY26 capex by January, per oil ministry data.
Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.
news.summary:
Oil PSUs utilized 81% of FY26 capex by January, per oil ministry data.
Firms focus on boosting domestic production and refining capacities aggressively.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.

news.title:
Oil India reported Dec 2025 net sales of Rs 4,916.01 cr, down 6.2% Y-o-Y.
Net profit fell 33.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 808.31 cr; EPS dropped to Rs 4.97 from Rs 7.51.
news.summary:
Oil India reported Dec 2025 net sales of Rs 4,916.01 cr, down 6.2% Y-o-Y.
Net profit fell 33.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 808.31 cr; EPS dropped to Rs 4.97 from Rs 7.51.

news.title: Oil India and ONGC drop over 3% as Brent crude falls below $68/barrel.
news.summary: Oil India and ONGC drop over 3% as Brent crude falls below $68/barrel.

news.title:
Oil India Ltd held an analyst/investor call discussing Q3 FY26 results, highlighting a PAT of INR808.31 crores and consolidated revenue of INR9,111 crores.
Key operational updates include crude production ramp-up to 9,861 metric tons/day and completion of pipeline expansions, targeting enhanced energy security and production growth.
news.summary:
Oil India Ltd held an analyst/investor call discussing Q3 FY26 results, highlighting a PAT of INR808.31 crores and consolidated revenue of INR9,111 crores.
Key operational updates include crude production ramp-up to 9,861 metric tons/day and completion of pipeline expansions, targeting enhanced energy security and production growth.

news.title:
Numaligarh Refinery secures lowest green hydrogen bid at ₹279/kg from Oil India.
This milestone boosts renewable energy and supports regional energy transition efforts.
news.summary:
Numaligarh Refinery secures lowest green hydrogen bid at ₹279/kg from Oil India.
This milestone boosts renewable energy and supports regional energy transition efforts.

news.title:
Oil India Ltd conducted a conference call for Q3 FY2025-26 financial results.
Audio recording of the call is uploaded online; no UPSI was shared during the call.
news.summary:
Oil India Ltd conducted a conference call for Q3 FY2025-26 financial results.
Audio recording of the call is uploaded online; no UPSI was shared during the call.

news.title:
Oil India Ltd aims for 7.5-8.5 MMTOE production by FY28 through expansions.
The company plans pipeline expansions and strategic investments to achieve this.
news.summary:
Oil India Ltd aims for 7.5-8.5 MMTOE production by FY28 through expansions.
The company plans pipeline expansions and strategic investments to achieve this.

news.title:
Oil India's Q3 EBITDA is Rs 13.1B, down slightly from Rs 13.25B QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.6%, up from 24.3% QoQ.
news.summary:
Oil India's Q3 EBITDA is Rs 13.1B, down slightly from Rs 13.25B QoQ.
EBITDA margin improved to 26.6%, up from 24.3% QoQ.

news.title:
Oil India reports Q3FY26 PAT at ₹1,436 crore, slightly down from ₹1,457 crore YoY.
Nine-month PAT at ₹5,126 crore; declares ₹7/share interim dividend; crude oil production highest in a decade.
news.summary:
Oil India reports Q3FY26 PAT at ₹1,436 crore, slightly down from ₹1,457 crore YoY.
Nine-month PAT at ₹5,126 crore; declares ₹7/share interim dividend; crude oil production highest in a decade.

news.title:
Oil India declared Rs 7/share 2nd interim dividend for FY26.
Board approved divestment of 50% in a non-operational Russian asset.
news.summary:
Oil India declared Rs 7/share 2nd interim dividend for FY26.
Board approved divestment of 50% in a non-operational Russian asset.
